answers: For self-learning: Coursera, Udemy, Khan Academy. Practice consistently, build projects, join communities.
Best free resources: Khan Academy, Coursera (audit for free), YouTube, and MIT OpenCourseWare. Learning is free — commitment isn't.
To learn effectively online: pick one platform (Coursera, Udemy, or edX), follow a structured course, and build something with each new concept.
Online learning works best when combined with practice. Watch → understand → build → repeat. Join Discord communities to stay accountable.
